MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Adrian Colley; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiffs Tso Chien Pan and Shiu Ming Lee are present. Represented by Collmba Canas.
Attorney Karen Uchiyama for the plaintiffs.
Defendant Kristoffer Hansson is present.
Attorney Jared Rudolph appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Adrian Colley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of DEC-09-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
